title: Xu Liqing
content:
He bring along a youth to enter 
Land of the Ancient God
 together with 
Duanmu Ji
, 
Wang Qingyue
, 
Gun Lan
, 
Hunchback Meng
, and 
Wang Lin
.

Apperance
[
]

On the boat stood a very handsome man, but his lips were a bit thin, revealing a sense of ruthlessness. His hands were behind his back and his head was held up high. He was wearing bright red clothes with golden threads embroidered on them. His long, black hair was scattered behind him and moved with the wind.
[
1
]

Plot
[
]

Meet again with his teacher Sky Devil Magician in third trial and got sacrificed by him to open tunnel that lead to inheritance of knowledge.
